task_completion.description: Resolve N+1 queries in the artist endpoint
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing the artist endpoint query updated to use eager loading (e.g., `joinedload`, `selectinload`, or `subqueryload`), or terminal showing the specific test for the artist endpoint passing.
Code editor showing SQLAlchemy relationship definitions updated with cascade options (e.g., `cascade="all, delete-orphan"`), or terminal showing the cascade deletion test passing.

task_completion.description: Resolve self-referential model mapping errors for employees
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing the Employee model relationship updated with `remote_side` (e.g., `remote_side=[id]`) to correctly map manager-to-employee relationships, or terminal showing the employee mapping test passing.

task_completion.description: Resolve float precision bugs in revenue calculation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing revenue columns or calculations updated to use `Numeric(asdecimal=True)`, `Decimal`, or casting to exact numeric types instead of standard floats, or terminal showing the revenue calculation test passing.

Code editor showing database-side aggregation functions (e.g., `func.sum()`, `func.count()`, `func.avg()`) replacing Python-side loops or `sum()` functions, or terminal showing the aggregation test passing.

task_completion.description: Ensure all tests in pytest tests/ pass
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing the execution of `pytest tests/` with a successful outcome (e.g., green 'PASSED' text, '100%', or 'X passed' indicating no failures).

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual application/ORM files, not the test files
integrity.visual_evidence: Code editor shows modifications in the application source code (e.g., `models.py`, `crud.py`, `main.py`). The `tests/` directory files should not be modified to force a passing result.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely executed pytest in the terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows standard pytest output including test collection, execution time, and summary, rather than a simple echo command or printed text file.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode expected answers to bypass database queries
integrity.visual_evidence: Code editor shows endpoints and functions returning results from SQLAlchemy queries (e.g., `db.query(...)`), not hardcoded dictionaries, lists, or static numeric values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The pass threshold for this task is 60 out of 100 possible points across the 5 distinct SQLAlchemy bug checks. The database being queried is a synthetically generated subset of the Chinook SQLite database.
